title: ononis repens subsp. masquillierii
intro: Ononis repens subsp. masquillierii, also known as the creeping spurge or lesser burnet, is a subspecies of the Ononis repens plant, which is a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis repens subsp. masquillierii include its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice for skin conditions.
